projectDescription: A team methodology that captures decisions, reasoning, and knowledge as traces during AI-assisted work, enabling any team member — human or AI — to resume from any checkpoint without losing context.
keyFeatures: Trace-first methodology: every task produces HL, RES, TS, ONB, RF, and REVIEW artifacts that form permanent project memory
9-status task pipeline: TODO → HL_DRAFT → RES → TS_DRAFT → ONB → RF → REV → KNW → DONE
4 distinct roles: Coordinator, Researcher, Executor, Reviewer — each with Role Lock enforcement
Tool-agnostic core (.tfw/) with adapters for Claude Code, Cursor, and Antigravity
Multi-iteration research with OODA Stage Loop and filesystem-as-state-machine
Knowledge compounding: Fact Candidates from every artifact consolidated into verified topic files
Centralized PROJECT_CONFIG.yaml for scope budgets, templates, workflows, and research limits
Semver versioning with tfw-update workflow for upgrading from upstream starter
publicApiSurface: /tfw-plan — create a new task (HL → research → TS)
/tfw-handoff — execute an approved task (ONB → implement → RF)
/tfw-resume — continue interrupted work (status matrix → next phase)
/tfw-knowledge — consolidate fact candidates into verified knowledge
/tfw-docs — update KNOWLEDGE.md and TECH_DEBT.md after task completion
/tfw-release — cut a versioned release (VERSION bump → CHANGELOG → tag)
/tfw-init — initialize TFW in a new or existing project
/tfw-config — interactive config change with propagation to inline values
